title: U Cinn - Phospholipids Assay
author: Patrick Tso
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xmvfk66

steps.instruction: Prepare working standards by making a serial dilution of the stock 300mg/dl standard. (See diagram below) *Stock standard included in kit.
Prepare Working Reagent by reconstituting one vial of Color Reagent with a portion of Buffer then transferring entire contents to Buffer bottle, rinsing Color Reagent vial several times.
Using a 96 well flat bottom plate, into separate wells, pipette 2μL of deionized water, standard, or sample to be assayed.
Add 300μL of Working Reagent to all wells.
Determine the absorbance (abs) of the standards and of each unknown at 600nm.

Calculate values of unknowns from the standard curve. Specimen: Serum or Plasma. Specimen stable for 7 days at 2-8°C or 3 months at -20°C. Assay Linearity: 1000 mg/dl Reagent Stability: 7 days at 2-8°C Stability of Final Reaction: 60 minutes
